game_difficulty.shipbuilder_description: If you want to peacefully construct your ship or just explore. Threats will be mostly non-existent and factions will be mostly friendly. Your pawns will have a permanent mood buff.
game_difficulty.timid_description: For those that prefer a more laid back slightly easier experience. Threats will be lower and incidents will be less frequent.
game_difficulty.normal_description: This offers the standard classic experience. Best suited to those that have played before.
game_difficulty.brutal_description: Only choose this option if you want a real challenge, this is only advised for more experienced players. Incidents will be more hostile and will occur much more frequently. Factions will be more foe than friend.

game_type.progressive_description: Creates a more harmonious and laid back experience. Whilst there is still some randomisation, the game will try and tailor a bespoke experience. Incidents will be more calculated and progressive, giving you extra breathing space.
game_type.random_description: Faction alignment, incidents and various other elements of the game will be much more randomised offering a more dramatic experience. Things could either go really well or horribly wrong.

game_mode.survival_description: The classic experience, where you can construct your ship to explore the universe and survive for as long as possible.

game_settings.world_seed_description: Here you can change the random seed for the current universe. You can then share this seed so others can play the same universe as you.
game_settings.seed_line_edit_hint: Start typing to choose your own seed.

restart_game_prompt: You must restart the game for any adjusted settings to be applied.
game_over_pawns_dead:
All of your crew members have died, and there is no one left to operate your ship.

You can either choose to leave and return to the main menu, or you can continue, in the hope that someone will rescue your ship and allow you to continue.
game_over_ship_blown:
Your ship has been destroyed and any survivors will surely die, drifting in the cold, dark expanse of space whilst watching their air and energy levels slowly decrease to zero.

You can either leave and return to the main menu, or continue, and hope for a miracle.
quit_confirm: Are you sure? If you quit now, you will lose any unsaved progress.
does_not_have_enough_skill_to_perform_ac: %s does not have enough %s skill to perform this action!
ship_arrived: The {ship_name} is now in comms range
heat_total:
The current highest recorded temperature on the ship: {current_temp}.

A higher temperature means a higher chance for fires to start.

 [color=GRAY]This also includes doors.[/color]
atmosphere_total:
The overall breathable air compared to the maximum internal pressure.

 [color=GRAY]This also includes doors.[/color]
en_power_source: The amount of power added to the grid compared to the amount available.
en_power_receiver: The amount of power taken from the grid compared to the amount needed.
en_battery: The amount of power stored compared to the amount it can store.
en_work_to_build: How much work there is left to construct this object.
flag_for_deconstruction_cancel: Request this item to be deconstructed.
choose_export_ship_name: Name your exported ship. This will be the file name, so choose something unique.
ship_export_info: Once your ship has been exported, it can be found in your user data folder. You can then copy this ship to a scenario file and use it in a new game after selecting that scenario.

menus.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this saved game? This cannot be undone.
menus.overwrite_confirmation: Are you sure you want to overwrite this saved game? This cannot be undone.

room_panel.oxygen_pressure: The current oxygen pressure in this room.
room_panel.carbon_dioxide_pressure: The current carbon dioxide pressure in this room.
room_panel.hazardous_gas_pressure: The current amount of hazardous gas in this room.
room_panel.breached_hint: This room has been breached and is losing atmosphere.
room_panel.sealed_hint: This room is fully sealed and retaining atmosphere.
room_panel.temperature_hint: The overall temperature in this room.
room_panel.room_at_capacity: Room at capacity. You must construct more sleeping spots.
room_panel.lock: Lock this room to prevent anyone from being able to assign themselves to it.

character_panel.health: The overall health of this creature.
character_panel.gas_tank_level: How much air the currently equipped gas tank has remaining.

object_panel.air_source: The amount of gas being produced.
object_panel.stored_air: The amount of gas currently stored.
object_panel.stored_power: The amount of power currently stored.
object_panel.cancel_recipe_order:
Cancel order.

If a recipe has already started, then all ingredients will be lost.

morale_panel.morale:
Morale: {percentage}%

Mood reflects this creatures frame of mind.

If this gets too low then this creature may decide to ignore commands or far worse.
morale_panel.hunger:
Hunger: {percentage}% ({stat_value})

Hunger relates to the amount of solids this creature has consumed recently.
morale_panel.thirst:
Thirst: {percentage}% ({stat_value})

Thirst relates to the amount of fluids this creature has consumed recently.
morale_panel.energy:
Energy: {percentage}%

Energy relates to the amount of energy this creature can exert before becoming exhausted.

equipment_panel.encumbrance:
Total mass.

The total mass of this creature. Includes this creatures own mass combined with all items equipped.
equipment_panel.temperature_range:
Temperature range.

The range of temperature this creature feels most comfortable.
equipment_panel.durability:
Durability.

The total durability of all items equipped.
equipment_panel.rad_defence:
Radiation defence.

The total radiation defence of this creature. Includes this creatures own radiation defence combined with all items equipped.

crew_panel.always_try_wear_spacesuit: Select to ensure this character will always try and wear a full spacesuit if available.
crew_panel.allow_removal_of_helmet: Select to allow this character to remove their helmet whenever possible.
crew_panel.clear_current_role:
No role 

Clear the current role.

context.not_assigned_work_type: Cannot {adjective}: Not assigned this work type
context.cannot_path_to_medical_supplies: Cannot {adjective}: Cannot path to medical supplies
context.cannot_path_to_fuel: Cannot {adjective}: Unable to path to any fuel
context.cannot_path_to_seed: Cannot {adjective}: Unable to path to any seeds
context.cannot_path_to_food: Cannot {adjective}: Unable to path to any food
context.cannot_path_to_drink: Cannot {adjective}: Unable to path to any drink

systems_power_button: Turn all the ships power on or off.
black_alert_tooltip: Black Alert: Everyone get back to the ship!
jump_to_high_burn:
Propel to high burn.

Warning: Doing so will leave everything in this sector behind.
drop_from_high_burn: Drop from high burn. Doing so will leave you vulnerable to your surroundings and require you to recharge your burn meter.
pawn_initiated_trade: {pawn_name} has initiated trade with a social skill of {skill_level}
sys_ship_name_button:
The ships currently registered name.

Click to rename this ship.
sys_captain_button:
The current captain of this ship.

Click to assign a new captain.
sys_quartermaster_button:
The current quartermaster of this ship.

Click to assign a new quartermaster.

facility_panel.bribe_info: Here you can attempt to bribe this ship. Be warned though that a failed bribe attempt could have catastrophic consequences.
facility_panel.no_trade_low_relation: Unable to trade due to low relations.
facility_panel.no_trade_no_pawn: There is no one to initiate a trade.
facility_panel.no_pawn_no_bribe: There is no one to initiate a bribe.
facility_panel.hint_ship_trading: Trading requires positive relations, a Comms console, and a crew member to initiate the trade.
facility_panel.hint_bribe_ship: If this ship is hostile, bribing them may force them to leave.
facility_panel.already_bribed: You cannot bribe this ship any more.
facility_panel.attempt_to_bribe: It will cost you {bribe_amount} coins for each attempted bribe.

planet_panel.scan_description: With the right scanning equipment you can find out more about this celestial object.
planet_panel.visit_planet_description: You need a transport ship to send a team to this planet.

click_to_center: Click here to jump to the subject.
fatal_error_files_missing_or_corrupt: FATAL ERROR: Files missing or corrupt needed to run the game. {message}. Shutting down! - please check for file or folder typo's or re-download the files and report a bug with your log data.
nowhere_to_drink: There is nowhere for your crew to drink from
nowhere_to_eat: There is nowhere for your crew to eat from
nowhere_to_sleep: There are no available beds for your crew to sleep in
nothing_to_drink: Your crew has nothing to drink
nothing_to_eat: Your crew has nothing to eat

notification.could_not_create_role: This role could not be created.
notification.follow_tutorial: Please read and follow the current tutorial message.
